name: Somersville
notes: Standard width 3"; other widths on request. Lites: standard + deluxe.

name: Georgetown
notes: Standard width 3"; other widths on request. Lites: standard + deluxe.

name: Cambridge
notes: Standard width 3"; rope moulding inlaid. Species: alder, maple, red oak, white oak, cherry, PG hdwd, walnut.

name: Petersburg
notes: Standard width 2-1/4"; 2-1/2" and 3" with upcharge. Default edge E-32; select edge from p40-42.

name: Williamsburg
notes: Standard width 2-1/4"; 2-1/2" and 3" with upcharge. Default edge E-46; select edge from p40-42. Multi-paneled parts not available.

name: Chesapeake
notes: Standard width 2-1/4"; 2-1/2" and 3" with upcharge. No lite styles.

name: Chantilly
notes: Standard width 2-1/4"; rope moulding inlaid. Species: alder, maple, red oak, white oak, cherry, PG hdwd, walnut.

name: Brookhaven (Rosewood Edge)
notes: Apply any Group A inside profile. To order, replace X in MP-7P-X with profile number (e.g. MP-7P-15). Std 2-1/4"; 2-1/2" and 3" with upcharge. Lites: standard + deluxe based on selected profile. Great for glazed finishes.

name: Hartford
notes: Standard width 2-1/2". No other widths except DF pattern. No lite styles.

name: MP-56
notes: Standard width 2-1/2"; 2-1/4" and 3" with upcharge. No lite styles.
